name: Health Potion
description: A vial of shimmering red liquid. Restores 5 HP.

name: Greater Health Potion
description: A potent healing brew. Restores 10 HP.

name: Mana Crystal
description: A fragment of crystallised mana. Restores 3 mana during battle.

name: Arcane Scroll
description: A scroll inscribed with an arcane blast spell. Adds Arcane Blast to your collection.

name: Tome of Ice
description: A frozen tome containing ice magic. Adds Ice Barrier to your collection.

name: Academy Badge
description: Your official student identification badge. Required for certain areas.
